title: Fix product update and image listing issues
description:
1. Update ProductUpdate schema in backend/app/api/v1/products/schemas.py to include optional images and variants.
2. Update ProductService.update_product in backend/app/api/v1/products/service.py to synchronize images and variants with the DB (upsert/delete).
3. In ProductRepository.list_products, ensure main_image_url is populated even if no image is marked as cover.
acceptance_criteria: ProductUpdate schema contains images: List[ProductImageBase] and variants: List[ProductVariantBase]
ProductRepository.list_products returns at least one image if available, even without a cover flag
Backend linting and type checking pass
